title: SwitchTail direction report — modularization timing, coupling friction, language
summary: Adversarially-verified assessment of SwitchTail's coupling depth, modularization timing (selective: cut agent seams now), and debiased spine-language ranking with trigger tables.
scope: spine language strategy (bash vs Python vs compiled)
notes: Ambiguity resolved: contains decision-like verdicts ('timing verdict: SELECTIVE', a ranked language guidance) but no ADR markers (no Status field, no Decision/Consequences sections, no numbered filename) and verdicts are trigger-gated guidance rather than a single locked decision; classified DOC over ADR. Cross-refs are source-code paths only, no other planning docs referenced.
